name: specode
description: Lightweight spec-driven workflow: orchestrates superpowers skills per phase, lands 3 fixed docs (requirements/design/implementation-log) in your specs dir. v2.1 added phase-0 context-recall. v3.0 added specode-distill sub-skill. v3.0.1 added specode-distill P2-2 rules/pitfalls pre-check. v3.1 closes AI-EDS P3-2 — step 2.2 injection now renders knowledge *content* (not just wikilinks) so the design phase sees actual rules/pitfalls; step 3 design phase ends with a post-check that flags any rule-* from requirements not acknowledged in design.md (requires codemap-aimemory 0.4.0+ for --with-content / freshness fields).
